en.name: Bullpen
en.desc: Divide the grid into rectangular pens
en.description: Bullpen (also known as Shikaku) is a satisfying logic puzzle where you partition the grid into rectangles! Each numbered cell must be contained in a rectangle exactly that size. Rectangles cannot overlap and must cover the entire grid. It's a perfect blend of spatial reasoning and arithmetic—deduce the shape and position of each pen from the number clues!
en.objectives: Divide the entire grid into rectangular regions so that each numbered cell is contained in a rectangle of exactly that area. Every cell must belong to exactly one rectangle, and rectangles cannot overlap.
en.howToPlay: Click and drag to create rectangles on the grid. Each number indicates the area of its rectangle. Rectangles cannot overlap and must cover the entire grid. Each rectangle contains exactly one number.

rules.controls: Click and drag to draw a rectangle. The rectangle size is shown as you drag. Right-click or press Delete to remove a rectangle.
mechanics: Each number is contained in a rectangle of that area
Every rectangle contains exactly one number
All cells must be covered by rectangles
Rectangles must have integer dimensions (e.g., 6 = 1×6 or 2×3)
features: Area Display - See rectangle size as you draw
Overlap Prevention - Cannot place conflicting rectangles
Progress Tracking - See how many numbers solved
Multiple Grid Sizes - Various difficulty levels

tips: Start with regions that have the most constraints
Prime numbers can only be 1×N rectangles
Each rectangle must contain exactly one number
Rectangles cannot overlap or cross region boundaries

faq.question: How do I know what shape a rectangle should be?
faq.answer: A number N can form rectangles of any dimensions that multiply to N. For example, 6 can be 1×6, 2×3, 3×2, or 6×1. Use surrounding constraints to determine which shape fits.

faq.question: What if a number is prime?
faq.answer: Prime numbers (like 7 or 11) can only form 1×N rectangles. This makes them excellent starting points since their shape is forced.

faq.question: Can I leave empty cells?
faq.answer: No. The puzzle is solved only when every cell is covered by exactly one rectangle. No overlaps, no gaps.

faq.question: What's the best strategy?
faq.answer: Start with numbers that have forced shapes (primes) or forced positions (corner numbers, numbers near edges). Then use the constraint that rectangles can't overlap to narrow down remaining options.

zh.name: 佛系消消消
zh.desc: 超解压的逻辑消消乐游戏
zh.description: 佛系消消消是一款超级解压的逻辑消消乐游戏！根据数字提示划出矩形区域，每个数字代表该区域的大小。规则简单易上手，越玩越上瘾，是打发时间、锻炼大脑的绝佳选择！无需下载，网页直接玩，每天玩几局，轻松又治愈。
zh.objectives: 将整个网格划分为若干矩形区域，使每个带数字的格子包含在恰好该面积的矩形中。每个格子必须恰好属于一个矩形，矩形之间不能重叠。
zh.howToPlay: 点击并拖动鼠标画出矩形区域。每个数字表示它所在矩形的大小。例如数字6可以是1×6或2×3的矩形。矩形不能重叠，必须覆盖整个网格。轻松简单，佛系治愈！

rules.controls: 鼠标点击拖动绘制矩形，绘制时显示面积大小。右键或按Delete键删除已画的矩形。
mechanics: 每个数字所在的矩形面积必须等于该数字
每个矩形内只能有一个数字
必须覆盖整个网格，不能有空隙
矩形尺寸必须是整数（如6=1×6或2×3）
features: 实时显示面积 - 拖动时显示矩形大小
智能提示 - 自动检测冲突
多难度关卡 - 从入门到挑战
无时间限制 - 佛系游玩，轻松解压

tips: 先找质数（如7、11、13），它们只能是1×N的长条形
从角落和边缘的数字开始，约束更多更容易确定
大数字更容易确定形状，优先处理
保持佛系心态，不着急慢慢来！

faq.question: 佛系消消消怎么玩？
faq.answer: 非常简单！用鼠标拖动画出矩形区域，让每个数字都包含在等于它数值面积的矩形中。比如数字6就要画一个面积为6的矩形（可以是1×6或2×3）。画满整个网格就过关啦！

faq.question: 佛系消消消难吗？
faq.answer: 入门超简单！从小网格开始玩，慢慢提升难度。这款游戏主打佛系解压，没有时间限制，想玩多久玩多久。越玩越上瘾，是通勤、摸鱼必备神器！

faq.question: 遇到质数怎么办？
faq.answer: 质数（如7、11、13）只能画成1×N的长条形，这反而让它们成为最佳突破口！优先处理质数，可以帮助你确定其他矩形的边界。

faq.question: 可以跳过关卡吗？
faq.answer: 当然可以！佛系消消消主打轻松解压，不喜欢这关就换一关。我们有大量关卡等你挑战，选择你喜欢的难度慢慢玩！

faq.question: 佛系消消消和抖音上的佛系消消消一样吗？
faq.answer: 我们的是网页版佛系消消消，玩法类似但更方便！无需下载安装，打开浏览器就能玩。同样解压上瘾，还能锻炼逻辑思维和空间推理能力！
